name: Angello
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring 3 3/4 cups of the juice to a simmer.
2. Sprinkle agar flakes on top of the heated juice; allow to simmer for 3 minutes with the flakes floating on top to soften the agar.
3. Stir the agar flakes into the juice. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes, stirring well.
4. Mix the kuzu with the remaining 1/4 cup juice. Stir until smooth.
5. Pour the kuzu mixture into the simmering juice and agar in the saucepan. Stir until thick and clear.
6. Add the fruit. Wait for it to rise to the surface.
7. Turn off the heat. Add the vanilla extract.
8. Allow to cool slightly. Stir to distribute the fruit evenly.
9. Chill until set.
Notes: Vary flavors of fruit juice (berry, cherry, peach, etc.). Select fruit that matches or complements the fruit flavor.
